alt: Archival specimen showing the remarkable structural density of the display feathers
caption: The black feathers of the superb bird-of-paradise absorb up to 99.95% of directly incident light, creating an optical illusion of absolute blackness.
acquisitionNotes: Curated fun-fact specimen detailing light-absorbing feather adaptations. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/1/18/Lophorina_superba_minor_%2848719815142%29.jpg
